item.title: Singapore Defence Agencies Partner With IBM to Explore Quantum Computing Applications
item.summary: Insider Brief Press release – The Singapore Armed Forces (SAF) Digital and Intelligence Service (DIS) and Defence Science and Technology Agency (DSTA) have partnered IBM to explore the use of quantum computing for complex mission planning, such as logistics optimisation use cases. Mission planning often requires balancing numerous operational constraints, resources and timelines, and quantum […]
